om_sql:
select sejour.sejour as ID,
sejour.animal as ID_animal,
animal.nom as animal,
sejour.provenance as provenance,
sejour.date_entree as date_d_entree,
sejour.date_sortie as date_de_sortie
from &DB_PREFIXEsejour left join &DB_PREFIXEanimal on animal.animal = sejour.animal where sejour.hebergement='&idx'

select soin.soin as id,
soin_type.libelle as type,
soin.date_soin as date,
soin.posologie as posologie,
soin.animal as ID_animal,
clinique.nom as clinique from &DB_PREFIXEsoin left join &DB_PREFIXEclinique on clinique.clinique = soin.clinique left join &DB_PREFIXEsoin_type on soin_type.soin_type = soin.soin_type where soin.veterinaire='&idx'

select soin.soin as id,
soin_type.libelle as soin_type,
veterinaire.nom as veterinaire,
clinique.nom as clinique,
soin.date_soin as date,
soin.posologie as posologie
from &DB_PREFIXEsoin left join &DB_PREFIXEveterinaire on veterinaire.veterinaire = soin.veterinaire left join &DB_PREFIXEclinique on soin.clinique = clinique.clinique left join &DB_PREFIXEsoin_type on soin_type.soin_type = soin.soin_type where soin.animal='&idx'

select veterinaire.veterinaire as id,
veterinaire.nom as nom,
veterinaire.prenom as prenom,
civilite.libelle as civilité,
veterinaire.telephone as telephone
from &DB_PREFIXEveterinaire left join &DB_PREFIXEcivilite on civilite.civilite = veterinaire.civilite where veterinaire.clinique='&idx'

select medicament.medicament as ID,
medicament.nom as nom,
medicament.dose as dose,
medicament.date_debut as date_debut,
medicament.date_fin as date_fin,
medicament.frequence as fréquence from &DB_PREFIXEmedicament where medicament.soin='&idx'

select medicament.medicament as ID,
medicament.nom as nom,
medicament.date_debut as date_debut,
medicament.date_fin as date_fin,
medicament.dose  as dose,
medicament.frequence as fréquence,
medicament.soin as ID_soin
from &DB_PREFIXEmedicament where medicament.animal='&idx'

select animal.animal as ID,
animal.num_identification,
animal.nom as nom,
animal_espece.nom as espece,
animal_race.nom as race,
animal.date_naissance as date_de_naissance,
animal_sexe.libelle as animal_sexe
from &DB_PREFIXEanimal left join &DB_PREFIXEanimal_espece on animal_espece.animal_espece = animal.animal_espece left join &DB_PREFIXEanimal_race on animal_race.animal_race = animal.animal_race left join &DB_PREFIXEanimal_sexe on animal_sexe.animal_sexe = animal.animal_sexe where animal.personne='&idx'

select animal_entree.animal_entree as id,
animal_entree.date_entree as date_entree
from &DB_PREFIXEanimal_entree where animal_entree.animal='&idx'

select animal_sortie.animal_sortie as id,
animal_sortie.date_sortie as date_sortie,
cause_mort.libelle as cause_mort
 from &DB_PREFIXEanimal_sortie left join &DB_PREFIXEcause_mort on cause_mort.cause_mort  = animal_sortie.cause_mort where animal_sortie.animal='&idx'
